petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* is rolling in circles excitedly around /c$2%1/c*. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項2: Watch it moving around in circles.
petaspect.選項3: Forbid it to move in circles.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* is crying at its owner /c$2%1/c* unhappily. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
/c$2%2/c* is rolling around the place acting shamelessly. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項1: Let it act this way until it tires out.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* is wagging right and left toward /c$2%1/c* acting cute. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項2: Give it a parental peck on the cheek.
petaspect.選項3: Pet its head and praise it.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* put it's head out when its owner wasn't watching it. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項3: Whistle and pretend to see nothing.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* cries towards its owner /c$2%1/c* in a shy fashion. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項1: Pat it's head and give it a slight smile.
petaspect.選項3: Not to dote on it. Ignore it.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* fell down onto the ground and began to cry. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項1: Get up by itself after fell.
petaspect.選項2: Console it in low and gentle voice.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* is pathetically staring at its owner /c$2%1/c*. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項2: Being stared at makes you feel lazy.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* is naughtily splashing water at its owner /c$2%1/c*. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項3: Smile helplessly at it's soaking body.

petaspect.敘述句: c$2%2/c* hides itself shyly under the water.(Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項1: Patiently persuade it to come out.
petaspect.選項2: Give it a gentle and shining smile.
petaspect.選項3: Pretend to be anxious to find it.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* puffed lots of bubbles towards its owner /c$2%1/c*. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項2: Catch and break all of the bubbles.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* lost it's temper and made water splash everywhere. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項1: Give it a grown up talking to.
petaspect.選項2: Comfort it, patiently, in a low voice.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* is so ashamed it has been reduced to tears. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項1: Enthusiastically inspire it to try again.
petaspect.選項2: Wipe the tear on it's face with a towel.
petaspect.選項3: Crying is part of growing up.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* is ignoring it's owner and playing with vermins instead. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項2: Insects have pathogens. Get rid of them.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c*'s temperature is rising high. Got a fever? (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項1: Don't play water in Winter again.
petaspect.選項2: Give it some ice blocks to make it cool.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* is leisurely swimming around its owner /c$2%1/c*. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項3: Order it to swim another 3000 metres.

petaspect.敘述句: The flame on /c$2%2/c* seems to be getting smaller. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項2: Excite it to stir up the inner flame.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* is full of angry flames. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項1: Amuse it and calm it's anger.
petaspect.選項3: Too dangerous. Put out the fire.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* angrily jumps up and down on the spot. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項1: Let it be, until it calms down by itself.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* enthusiastically hugs its owner.(Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項2: Refuse to hug it for justifiable reasons.
petaspect.選項3: Refuse it hug for unjustified reasons

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* is getting angry. It has taken to spying on it's owner. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項1: Swash next time it spies on you.
petaspect.選項2: Continue to be cold to it.
petaspect.選項3: Leave it alone and mind own business.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* pulls /c$2%1/c*'s clothes in order to draw your attention. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項3: Turn around and give it a loving look.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* is playing with fire at the side of road. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項1: Stop it from playing with fire.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* performs some bumbling poses to try to be handsome. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項3: Try to act cooler than it.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* is glaring at /c$2%1/c* and stamping feet to show its anger. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項3: Try to change it's mood by talking to it.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* is jumping and dancing excitedly around /c$2%2/c*. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
/c$2%2/c* places itself tightly around its owner /c$2%2/c* and coquets. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
/c$2%2/c* looks up at the sky blankly. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項2: Look up to see the same thing as it does.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* performs a difficult continuous back flip. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
/c$2%2/c* naughtily plays with the hair of it's owner /c$2%2/c*. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
/c$2%2/c* tickles it's owner /c$2%2/c*'s body. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項2: Use all your strength to throw it off.
petaspect.選項3: Turn back to scratch it's itches.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* sticks out it's tongue towards /c$2%2/c* making faces. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項3: Give it a blank facial expression.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* is sighing and swooning to the left and to the right. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
/c$2%2/c* scratches it's owner /c$2%2/c*'s face for no reason. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
/c$2%2/c* digs out a stone and happily presents it to /c$2%2/c*. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
/c$2%2/c* excitedly knocks and strikes at the ground. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項2: Show it that you are impatient.
petaspect.選項3: Stop it from striking the ground.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* is sitting on the floor blankly staring into space. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項3: Give it a massage to invigorate it.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* accidentally fell asleep. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項1: Cry out to wake it up.
petaspect.選項2: Wake it up in a low voice.
petaspect.選項3: Pour water onto it to wake it up.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* looks at it's owner /c$2%1/c* giggling. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
/c$2%2/c* is kneeling down on the ground piling up stones. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項2: Pull it up from the ground.
petaspect.選項3: Squat down to pile up stones together.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* is rolling in the mud. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
/c$2%2/c* turned it's back to you, showing solitude and loneliness. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
/c$2%2/c* disgruntled, it thumps the ground. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
/c$2%2/c* is excitedly licking its owner /c$2%1/c*'s face. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項2: Wipe it's face with a towel.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* is playfully leaning on its owner /c$2%1/c*'s back. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
/c$2%2/c* is downheartedly grovelling on the ground. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項1: Keep an eye on it far away.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* lays down with it's belly facing it's owner /c$2%1/c*. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項3: Only pat it once on the belly.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* ruins it's owner's boots. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項1: Accept the bad luck and dry yourself.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* suddenly cries out towards something in the distance. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項3: See the direction it is snarling towards

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* gives a big yawn. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項1: Copy it by having a big yawn yourself.
petaspect.選項2: Give it a massage to invigorate it.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* randomly scratches itself. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項1: Help it to shower with hot water.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* grovels with it's owner /c$2%1/c*, to play with it. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項1: Let it keep grovelling on the ground.
petaspect.選項2: Push it away due to its heavy weight.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* is scampering about in a high spirits. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
/c$2%2/c* is staring at it's owner /c$2%1/c* with begging eyes. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項3: Give it a dessert to cheer it up.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* is crying at it's owner /c$2%1/c* unhappily. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項3: Capture it and teach it a lesson.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* is dancing a strange dance around its owner /c$2%1/c*. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項1: Dance after it in the same fashion.
petaspect.選項2: Sing to the beat of it's dance.
petaspect.選項3: Tired of watching it, you fell asleep.

petaspect.敘述句: Some Vermins are found on /c$2%2/c*'s body.(Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項3: Carefully get rid of the Vermins.

petaspect.敘述句: Some parts of /c$2%2/c*'s body are injured. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項3: Keep it as a showy scar.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* is giving off a great deal of Phytonicidene. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項2: Expel the carbon dioxide from it's mouth.
petaspect.選項3: Keep a careful eye on it.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* is leaning on it's owner's /c$2%1/c*'s feet softly. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項1: Ignore it to toughen it up purposely.
petaspect.選項2: So cute that cann't help petting it.
petaspect.選項3: Why is it behaving so creepy?

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* is staring at its owner /c$2%1/c* pathetically. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項1: So cute that you cann't help holding it.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* has buried half of its body into the earth to absorb nutrients. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項3: Help it fertilize and water the soil.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* hides itself in the earth because it is angry with /c$2%1/c*. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項1: Start to dig it out from the earth.
petaspect.選項2: Wait until it can stand up by itself.
petaspect.選項3: Make efforts to persuade it out.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* kisses its owner /c$2%1/c* softly on the face. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項2: Wipe it's face in a detatched way.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* embraces its owner /c$2%1/c* wrapping its arms around him.(Your act affects Pet's growth)
/c$2%2/c* angrily spanks its owner /c$2%1/c*. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項2: Endure the pain of the spank quietly.
petaspect.選項3: Ask for the reason of her anger.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* smiles at its owner /c$2%1/c* smugly. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項1: Pretend to be cool and indifferent.
petaspect.選項3: The smile makes you blush a little.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* is heavy-heartedly looking somewhere into the distance. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項1: Stay beside her, and do as she do.
petaspect.選項3: Move over and shoot the breeze with her.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* grumbles into its owner /c$2%1/c*'s ears. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項1: You can't bare it and shut her up.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* is dancing beautifully in the sky. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項1: Focus on the enemies all around.
petaspect.選項3: Hum songs to the beat of her dancing.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* stares at its owner /c$2%1/c*. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項1: Your heart is beating faster and faster.
petaspect.選項3: Strive to not let feelings run amok.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* makes many kinds of gestures in front of the mirror. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
/c$2%2/c* stretches out its neck to look around vigilantly. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項1: So funny that you cann't help laugh.
petaspect.選項3: It has no manners, strike it on the head.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* is wagging its tail at its owner /c$2%1/c*. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
/c$2%2/c* angrily emits thick black smoke from its mouth and nose. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項1: Tell it some old jokes to comfort it.
petaspect.選項2: Pour water on its head to calm it down.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* behaves rebelliously toward its owner /c$2%1/c*. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項1: Avoid confronting it face to face.
petaspect.選項2: Take a strict approach with it.
petaspect.選項3: Be humble when you make up with it.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* bellows madly all around. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項1: Stop it by any means necessary.
petaspect.選項3: For your own security, leave it alone.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* snarls at the small animals around it. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項1: Give it food so it will stop snarling.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* cuddled itself up, finally fell asleep on the ground. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項2: Remind it to prepare for fighting.
petaspect.選項3: Let it have a good rest.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* turns around to scratch the squamae on it's back with its claws. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
petaspect.選項1: Help it to scratch squamae on its back.
petaspect.選項2: Clean the parasites behind the squamaes.

petaspect.敘述句: /c$2%2/c* lowers its head towards its owner /c$2%1/c*, calling gently. (Your act affects Pet's growth)
